content.title: Stardust Reader
content.short_description: Immersive Ancient Library web reader with page-flip.
content.description: A premium web-based novel reader application built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. The application provides an immersive reading experience with realistic page-flip animations and a distraction-free ancient library aesthetic. It supports bilingual content (English/German), persistent reading progress, and dynamic book loading from a structured content management system.
content.role: I designed and built the complete novel reader application from scratch, implementing the core reading interface with react-pageflip animations, creating a responsive sidebar navigation system with table of contents and bookmarks, developing a bilingual content management system with automatic chapter discovery, establishing the ancient library parchment theme with serif typography, implementing persistent state management using Zustand and localStorage, creating a comprehensive test suite with Jest and React Testing Library, and writing detailed documentation including the Adding Books Guide.

achievements: Successfully launched a production-ready novel reader with comprehensive feature set
Implemented bilingual support for German and English content with automatic language detection
Created an intuitive content management system allowing easy addition of new books without code changes
Achieved responsive design optimized for both desktop and mobile reading experiences
Established comprehensive test coverage ensuring code reliability and maintainability

screenshots: Main reading interface showing page-flip animation
